subject: status
body: On track — PR #132 up for #115 (OpenCode telemetry parity: tool.execute.after + dispose flush in the generated hooks, bare emit --flush in the CLI, README + tests). Full suite green locally (258 passed); waiting on CI, will squash-merge when green.
